content.rendered:
Accessibility

Easy Access for All

The Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) defines requirements for designers and developers to improve accessibility for people with disabilities. It defines three levels of conformance: Level A, Level AA, and Level AAA. grouponeusa.com is fully conformant with W3C Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level A and Level AA.. Fully conformant means that the content fully conforms to the accessibility standard without any exceptions.

The User Experience

Our commitment to providing all customers with the best user experience is strong and ongoing. With resources dedicated to the design, development and testing of all digital assets, we are working to bring compliance to the next level by meeting W3C Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level A and Level AA.

Our efforts to provide the accessible web and mobile app experiences are supported by these key accessibility features:

  • navigational aids for screen readers users
  • text equivalents for images and non-visual elements
  • heading structures for page elements
  • easy navigation of keyboard-only users
  • consistent navigation mechanism and design across all assets

We Welcome your Feedback

We strive to make this site—and everything we do—accessible to all of our customers. Please let us know if you encounter accessibility barriers on grouponeusa.com. We try to respond to feedback within 2 business days.

  • Phone: 888-594-4939
  • E-mail: info@1111mediagroup.com
